# Act on Processing of Personal Data

Jurisdiction: Czech Republic
Region: CZ
Citation: Act No. 110/2019 Coll., on Processing of Personal Data
Authority: Office for Personal Data Protection
Source URL: https://uoou.gov.cz/en/legislation
Topics: public_sector, law_enforcement, data_subject_rights, accountability
Keywords: Czech Act on Processing of Personal Data, UOOU, GDPR implementation

## Summary
Czech law adapting GDPR and law-enforcement data protection rules to national law.

## Key compliance obligations
- Assess Czech national exemptions and public-sector rules.
- Use UOOU guidance for local application.
- Document national-law processing bases.
